translation_notes: Z-score calculation approximated using price_pos_20 (normalized price position over 20-period lookback). Upper threshold of +1.5 std devs mapped to price_pos_20 > 1.5; lower threshold of 0.0 std devs mapped to price_pos_20 < 0.0. Signal is direction-agnostic (CONTEXT_DEPENDENT), so both long and short entry/exit conditions are provided. Lookback window of 20 periods aligns with price_pos_20 indicator calculation window.
validation_issues: exit_short: phantom condition 'price_pos_20 > 0.0' is always true
entry_long: impossible condition 'price_pos_20 > 1.5' is always false
entry_short: impossible condition 'price_pos_20 < -1.5' is always false
